query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_imagem,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_imagem
FROM players;

  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_imagem
